programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Scourge
programme.desc: Munch and Fin canvass the streets searching for a religiously motivated serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when an unidentified man is found shot and gang-sodomized in an alley outside of a gay bar.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Choice
programme.desc: A mother switches from victim to accused as the life of her unborn child is threatened.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Goliath
programme.desc: Violent behaviour is linked to an anti-malaria drug, which was administered by the army.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Living Legend
programme.desc: In the ultimate 'who-dunnit,' the team investigates a baffling mystery involving an infamous mob boss from the seventies, who's Cadillac mysteriously resurfaces in a Las Vegas lake.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Anonymous
programme.desc: After a state department employee and a plastic surgeon are murdered by a group of terrorists, the NCIS team must frantically search for the only witness who can identify the killers' surgically altered faces.

programme.title: NCIS: A Desperate Man
programme.desc: When a navy lieutenant commander is found dead in a building under construction, NCIS must search for a killer while dealing with interruptions from her distraught detective husband. Meanwhile, Ray's return has Ziva thinking about her future.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Tensions between Voight and Antonio builds as Internal Affairs digs into a murder case which potentially involves Voight's son.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Different Mistakes
programme.desc: Voight is assigned to a new Internal Affairs handler, Stillwell, who proves to be suspicious of Voight's actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Material Witness
programme.desc: A case hits close to home when the intelligence unit takes on a gang shooting with one living witness.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Santa Claus Is Comin' to Town
programme.desc: Kris Kringle overcomes the evil Burgermeister Meisterburger who has banned toys from the land of Sombertown. With the help of Mother Nature, magical elves and special reindeer, he is able to deliver toys to children all over the world.

programme.title: Frosty the Snowman
programme.desc: A discarded silk top hat becomes the focus of a struggle between a washed-up stage magician and a group of schoolchildren after it brings a snowman to life. Pursued by the greedy magician and rising temperatures, Frosty sets off for the North Pole.

programme.title: Rudolph, the Red-Nosed Reindeer
programme.desc: Recount the tale of a shy reindeer whose Christmas spirit is dampened because his shiny red nose has made him the laughing stock of all Christmasville. Based on the popular song by Johnny Marks and narrated by Burl Ives.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone
programme.desc: A young boy is accidentally left at home when his family goes away for Christmas vacation. He must fend for himself as he faces burglars, scary neighbours and other obstacles. At first he enjoys his freedom, but soon wants his family back for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Clause 3: The Escape Clause
programme.desc: Santa prepares for a busy Christmas with the mischievous Jack Frost as his assistant. The Jolly Old Elf has his work cut out for him when he has to deal with sabotage and a visit from his in-laws.

programme.desc: While Frankie focuses on rehearsing for a solo at her church's midnight Christmas mass, Mike takes over handling the chores of setting up the Heck family Christmas. Frankie becomes a bit jealous of Mike's ability to organize the holiday.

programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.desc: Jay wants Michael to find a way for his parents to start speaking to each other again.

programme.desc: Jr. wants Michael to teach him how to box so he can protect Claire from her boyfriend.

programme.desc: It's Michael's relaxed coaching vs. Janet's tough training for Kady's soccer team.

programme.desc: Michael has second thoughts about letting Janet work for him when she changes his routine.

programme.desc: Khadijah and Max plan a bachelorette bash for Synclaire at Madonna's penthouse.

programme.title: Living Single: Papa Was a Rolling Stone
programme.desc: Overton and Synclaire exchange wedding vows.

programme.title: Living Single: Never Can Say Goodbye
programme.desc: As Overton and Synclaire prepare to tie the knot, Kyle wrestles with a knotty decision.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: As her wedding approaches, a woman steps up to help launch a new museum, all while questioning if marrying her fiancé is the right choice.

programme.title: Movie: Five Star Christmas
programme.desc: When a travel writer shows up unexpectedly at their dad's B&B, the Ralston family all pretend to be guests in hopes of a good review.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas She Wrote
programme.desc: A romance writer has her column cancelled right before Christmas, so she heads home to reconnect with her family and sparks some romance of her own.

programme.title: Movie: Sense, Sensibility and Snowmen
programme.desc: A Christmas enthusiast, and her sister, clash with their latest client, a not-so-jolly toy company CEO.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: Sharing Christmas
programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman struggles to get into the holiday spirit while heading up her hometown parade. With the help of a Christmas sleigh and a handsome woodworker, she is destined to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Martina McBride is here to make cookies and Dave Koz performs with his saxophone.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked with creating a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: After getting off on the wrong foot with his future in-laws, Greg now faces a greater challenge: introducing his straight-laced in-laws to his own free-spirited family.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Superbad
programme.desc: Two nerdy high school seniors attend a party in hopes of losing their virginity before going off to different colleges.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: The children of South Park are invited to Arkansas for the 'Four Million Child Blow 2000,' the first worldwide recorder concert. When Cartman discovers the 'brown noise,' he changes the music for the concert, causing a very smelly mess.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.desc: With Aaron temporarily missing, the crew works on the Ford Galaxie. The shop gets crank calls from a guy claiming to be Dale Earnhardt Jr.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part I
programme.desc: The crew takes on a '68 Shelby Mustang that looks sweet, but what's it hiding? Richard flips his lid when Tom and Jordan buy two junker cars from two tourists. Richard and KC travel to a secret lair to make a deal on a Lotus Cortina and an amphibicar.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part II
programme.desc: Engine issues plague the '68 Shelby. Richard flips the rare '66 Lotus Cortina and floating Amphicar for some fast cash. A classic Ford Falcon arrives at the garage and selling it would be icing on the cake.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part I
programme.desc: Richard makes a risky deal to restore the first two Firebirds ever made from rusted and rough to museum quality. The buyer offers a handsome deal, but it comes with a crushing deadline and a 10K/day penalty for every day he's late. Aaron learns to race.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Sonic Camero, Part II
programme.desc: The Monkey's go super big with their first corporate client Sonic Drive-In to build a promotional 68 Camaro SS convertible. But with only days left until delivery, Richard might miss out on a huge pay day, and tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: C10 Race Truck/ Pike's Peak Pace Truck, Part II
programme.desc: Pikes Peak International Race is three days away and the C10 pace truck is nowhere near being complete. Aaron struggles to keep the Falcon damage free as he approaches the race of his life.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: One Cool Impala
programme.desc: When Richard buys a '65 Chevy Impala, they put their Gas Monkey spin on it. Richard and Aaron score a '34 Five Window Ford. And later, Richard agrees to cool off the monkeys with new air conditioning, but the Fired Up crew gets hot and bothered about it.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Rocking '76 G10 Van
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron take on a different build when they to transform a $300 find on the side of the road into a '76 Exploration van. The Dale Earnhardt '56 Nomad makes an appearance back at the shop, as KC and his team are tasked with fixing the body.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Never Stop Fighting

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Countdown to the New Season

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark

programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: A Very Casagrandes Christmas

programme.title: The Loud House: Season's Cheatings/ A Flipmas Carol
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: Kid of the Year

programme.title: The All-Star Nickmas Spectacular
programme.desc: Nickelodeon brings cheer this holiday with star-studded appearances and musical performances by JoJo Siwa, That Girl Lay Lay, and Ne-Yo as Nickelodeon star Lex Lumpkin journeys to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus before the biggest show of the year.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Math Emergency and Perky Palms
programme.desc: Sheldon and Dr. Sturgis have their first fight when Dr. Sturgis marks a question wrong on Sheldon’s test. Also, Mary takes over for Pastor Jeff while he's out sick.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Loaf of Bread and a Grand Old Flag
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Sheldon boycotts his favorite bread company. Also, Georgie offers Veronica a shoulder to cry on when she’s dumped by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Albert Einstein and the Story of Another Mary
programme.desc: Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test when Mary thinks she's pregnant.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Massapequa
programme.desc: Monica regrets volunteering to give a toast at her parents' 35th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Interview
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used as a clue in Soap Opera Digest's crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics during her baby shower when she realizes she is unprepared for motherhood.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Stung by a critical review of the food in her restaurant, Monica takes a cooking class.

programme.title: Mom: Flying Monkeys and a Tank of Nitrous
programme.desc: When Marjorie’s husband passes away, the ladies accompany her on a trip to memorialize him.

programme.title: Mom: Cottage Cheese and a Weird Buzz
programme.desc: Christy and Jill clash over a gambling debt, and Bonnie’s new hobby troubles Adam.

programme.title: Mom: Puzzle Club and a Closet Party

programme.title: Mom: Jell-O Shots and the Truth About Santa
programme.desc: Bonnie pushes Christy to mend her relationship with Violet, and Adam prepares for the grand opening of his bar.

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class

programme.title: Mom: Hacky Sack and a Beautiful Experience

programme.title: Mom: Big Floor Pillows and a Ball of Fire

programme.title: Mom: Kalamazoo and a Bad Wedge of Brie
programme.desc: Christy’s plan to win her sponsor’s approval backfires, and the ladies rush in to help after Jill’s house is broken into.

programme.title: Mom: Skippy and the Knowledge Hole
programme.desc: Christy finds it challenging to quit smoking, while Bonnie helps Tammy prepare to take the GED test.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Show
programme.desc: A widowed father with three girls gets help parenting from his brother-in-law and friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Get Skunked/ Pups and a Whale of a Tale
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups delicately try to tell her she needs a bath! The pups put a new spin on freeze tag when they fly north to help free a baby whale that's trapped under the ice.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Teeny Tiny Penguin/ Pups Save the Cat Show
programme.desc: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge. Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Move to Music/ School Project
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is getting Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music. It's school project time for Peppa and her friends, which means they have to build castles and bring them into playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Father Christmas/ Santa's Grotto/ Santa's Visit/ Mr. Potato's Christmas Show/ Snow
programme.desc: It is Christmas, and the children all visit Santa's Grotto to tell him what they would like for Christmas.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Blue's Night Before Christams

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: Santa's Little Fixers

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Old Trusty/ Pups Save a Pony

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Squirrels/ Pups Save a Roo

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Bluestock
programme.desc: We play Blue's Clues to figure out what song Blue wants to sing in the Bluestock show. Blue & Josh are excited to hear all of our musical friends sing.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Race Around the Earth

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pirate Pups to the Rescue

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas: The Night of the Turtles/ Santiago's Regatta
programme.desc: Bonnie kidnaps newly-hatched turtles before they can swim to their momma; Santi and crew struggle to win the Isla Encanto Regatta.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Mist Domes and Square Waves

programme.title: Mayday: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: Touching down on a narrow grass levee, the pilots of TACA Flight 110 manage a most remarkable landing. Investigators then try determining why the engines of a brand-new Boeing 737 failed in mid-flight.

programme.desc: The discovery of a scalp leads to a conviction; a teenager kills and tortures young boys.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Cowboys on the Case/ Office Politics
programme.desc: Four retired officers track down a killer; police wait for advancements in DNA technology.

programme.desc: Rochester police must race against time to prosecute an unknown schoolgirl rapist, or work to change the statutes. In 2003, San Diego forms a Cold Case Squad and re-opens the case of a young girl who had been stabbed and beaten to death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter

programme.title: Killer Cases: The Doctor is Dead
programme.desc: Dr. Teresa Sievers, a rising social media star, was found bludgeoned to death in her kitchen. Detectives began to focus on her husband Mark, who had taken out a large life insurance policy on his wife.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Burlesque
programme.desc: The owner of a burlesque lounge struggles to keep the club open. Meanwhile, a girl from small town Iowa falls in love with the art of burlesque and fulfills her dreams.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Santa’s Helpers and Holiday Dances
programme.desc: Joel McHale and Sarah McHale, Mike 'The Miz' Mizanin and Maryse Ouellet and Lamorne Morris and Alesha Renee compete remotely from their own homes in a special holiday-themed night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts
programme.desc: After finally choosing to move forward with her divorce, Khloé seeks solace in Mexico City at the big cat rescue foundation, Black Jaguar White Tiger. Meanwhile, Kris complicates matters by carrying on her own separate correspondence with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Santa to the Rescue!
programme.desc: For one magical night, Santa Claus is a hero to all the world's kids. Host Raven-Symone challenges the five teams of cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens outside of the North Pole when Santa steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: The Great Turkey Escape
programme.desc: Just in time for Thanksgiving, host Raven-Symone challenges five teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens when all those holiday turkeys decide to make a break for it. Shinmin Li and Erin McGinn judge the daring turkey escapes.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: When Toys Come Alive ... And Go Wild
programme.desc: This year, a little too much holiday magic accidentally brings all the toys to life on Christmas morning. Host Raven-Symone asks the five teams to show judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo what happens when the newly minted toys come alive.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone asks the four remaining teams of cake and sugar artists to create the most over-the-top, crazy visions of a Christmas party in the animal kingdom. Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo judge these wild critter holiday parties.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: North Pole Wedding
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone challenges the four remaining teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine the most-romantic wedding the world has ever seen at the North Pole. Judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo decide which team will go home with $25,000.

programme.title: Candy Land: Sports
programme.desc: Teams of professional cake and sugar artist compete to win $25,000.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Christmas: Toys, Toys, Toys
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro competes against Lego artists and brothers Corey and Travis Samuels in building an incredible, unique toy.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: It's What's on the Inside the Counts
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer gives the seven bakers advent calendars filled with chocolate to inspire them to make desserts with a surprise inside. Then, for the main heat, the competitors must bake one delicious cheesecake with three different flavors.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Back to Your Roots
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, are exploring some family history and recipes that go beyond their Southern heritage. The sisters cook their own versions of traditional English, Irish and Scottish recipes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Lazy Saturday
programme.desc: During the winter months, Trisha Yearwood loves to settle in by the fire and hang with her best gal pals, Beth, Glenda and Julie. She invites her friends over for a cozy weekend and treats them to easy cheese Danish and comforting wild mushroom soup.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Harvest Challenge
programme.desc: Spending three years on tour left Trisha Yearwood without her own garden, so she decided to sign up for a CSA box. Trisha loves fresh produce but can't always grow it herself, so the box is a perfect way to keep her on track and support local farmers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Picnic at the Vineyard
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is wining and dining her friends who are visiting from Las Vegas. They're headed to Arrington Vineyards, co-owned by Trisha's friend, country singer Kix Brooks, and Trisha makes a picnic with roasted beet and dill dip and pasta salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of the Holidays
programme.desc: Dinner is ready and the Kitchen is serving up the perfect plate for the holidays! Jeff Mauro's stuffed beef tenderloin kicks things off before Sunny Anderson brings in her maple and lemon pan roasted carrots.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Full House for the Holidays
programme.desc: Tis the season to have a full house for the holidays and Jeff Mauro is ready with his crowd-pleasing Santa's sausage and snow strata brunch. The hosts share their tips for prepping the perfect meat and cheese board.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Secret Santa
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts play Secret Santa for family and friends, surprising them with delicious food gifts. Katie Lee starts with a spinach artichoke dip pasta bake for her best friend, and Geoffrey Zakarian makes coconut maple granola.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: The chefs try to conquer mac and cheese and claim a spot in the Comfort Food Feud grand finale. The first round basket includes a cocktail, and the entree round sees the competitors working with a mac and cheese-inspired brunch item.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Burgers
programme.desc: In a burger-themed battle of the $25,000 Comfort Food Feud, the chefs get a deep-fried surprise and a sloppy classic in round one. In the entree round, they must figure out what to do with a bizarre canned product.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Pizza
programme.desc: The $25,000 Comfort Food Feud continues with a battle devoted to pizza. The competitors find spaghetti and meatballs in an unusual form in the entree basket, and the dessert round involves some spicy, salty and sugary ingredients.

programme.desc: A woman moves in with her boyfriend, convinced that her new life is a dream come true. She bonds with an elderly neighbour, but slowly realizes the woman believes her to be her long lost daughter.

programme.title: Movie: My Daughter Was Stolen
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes reality when her five-year-old daughter mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Movie: My Daughter's Ransom
programme.desc: A woman chaperones her daughter's field trip and witnesses her child being kidnapped. She is soon contacted by the kidnappers and sent on an elaborate quest to help her daughter return to her safely.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Devil Monkey, Melonheads, Blue Albino
programme.desc: Across America, grotesque, angry, vicious mutant monsters are out for revenge. Victims of unexplained terror at the hands of Melonheads, Devil Monkey, and the Blue Albino Woman come forward to share their horrifying stories.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Chupacabra, Zombie Soldier, Lake Worth Monster
programme.desc: Texas is a hotbed of monster activity. The Lake Worth community is being terrorized by a hybrid man-goat; in Cuero Phylis Canion has proof of a Chupacabra; and in Brownsville a young couple is attacked by an aggressive Zombie soldier.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Wendigo, Dogman, Wolfman
programme.desc: In Michigan, Wendigo transforms men into cannibals; in the countryside, a man-wolf preys on the road and in the city; a bloodthirsty manimal confronts Jeff Cornelius.

programme.title: Monsters and Mysteries in America: Batsquatch, Jersey Devil, Flying Humanoid
programme.desc: The Batsquatch reigns terror from the skies in the Rio Grande, the Jersey Devil attacks residents of the Pine Barrens and the Flying Humanoid stalks the Missouri Ozarks.

programme.title: When Monsters Attack: The Ozark Howler
programme.desc: Recently disclosed audio recordings and astonishing photographs provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the elusive and terrifying beast with horns known for centuries as the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: Survivorman: Bigfoot: Trails and Tales
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. He then returns to a legendary Sasquatch hot spot in the Canadian wild, where he encounters a more spiritual approach to the creature from believers.

programme.title: Bigfoot Is Real: Giant Swamp Creature
programme.desc: Gulf Coast Bigfoot Research Organization (GCBRO) founders Bobby Hamilton and Jim Lansdale lead a team of commandos on a mission to find and kill a Bigfoot in order to prove its existence to science and protect the public from a future attack.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Curse of the Druids
programme.desc: Don inspects a new find: ancient 'witches marks' in an English cave. To explore ties to the supernatural, Don visits magical wells and dives the wreck of 'the first Titanic.' He meets modern Druids to see if a bloody battle ended with a deadly curse.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Curse of the White City
programme.desc: Don ventures into a remote jungle to come face to face with a deadly curse. An ancient civilization once ruled what is now Eastern Honduras from a secret city. Don is uncovering clues about who they were and why such lethal dangers still protect it.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Devil Swamp
programme.desc: Don investigates dark cults in the Louisiana Bayou. He finds evidence of rituals and joins an exorcism to ward off evil. Don learns from a witch that the land has dark powers. He hunts ghostly orbs said to guard treasure and deadly cryptids.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Vampire Hunt
programme.desc: In Bulgaria Don uncovers new evidence of vampires. He joins a vampire hunt and looks for clues in a dangerous cave. In Hungary, he meets with a witch who links vampires to witchcraft and visits a jail that held the most famous vampire.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Temples of Doom
programme.desc: In Peru Don investigates a deadly ancient cult by undergoing their most terrifying ritual. In remote caves, he finds evidence of a supernatural war. Finally, he uncovers clues about bloody sacrifice...and reveals the truth of this dangerous religion.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Demon Woods
programme.desc: Don visits a Virginia town where paranormal activity is spiking and finds a connection to the lost Roanoke colony. Don retraces the path of a mysterious relic and explores whether dark magic brought to the New World could have doomed the settlers.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: The Nazis' Supernatural Weapons
programme.desc: Don gets access to a mysterious Nazi diary. Its dark clues take him to a perilous cave built to hide treasures and a crypt where Nazis held occult ceremonies. Don joins a witches' ritual to see how Hitler tried to use black magic to conquer the world.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ruined Peaches
programme.desc: Porsha and Tanya attempt to get all the girls to reconcile. Nene apologizes to Kenya for her hurtful comments. Marlo sends Kenya to her breaking point. On their last day in Greece, Kandi and Cynthia are determined to make up with Nene and Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: More Love More Problems
programme.desc: After a tumultuous trip to Greece, the women are back home in the ATL. Kandi heads to Chicago for a major acting opportunity, but her absence at home reopens old wounds. Eva debuts her baby to the world while Kenya's marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Moving Up and Moving On
programme.desc: Kenya takes her separation from Marc one step further, while Cynthia struggles to decide if she should make the big move to Los Angeles. NeNe and Gregg celebrate their 23rd anniversary in a very unconventional way, and Eva moves into her new dream home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: On the day of Kandi's baby shower, Mama Joyce and Todd's old feud reignites. NeNe gets the scoop on some bad press circulating about her, meanwhile Porsha has newfound issues with Kenya. Kandi's baby shower commences with a 'star is born' theme.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: No Justice, No Peace

programme.title: Below Deck: Jesus Saves
programme.desc: Chris Brown's decision to nap finds him in the crosshairs with Captain Lee. Kate puts her stews through 101 training in order to get them ready for their next charter. The new guests prove to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: Kate Goes to Church
programme.desc: During their night off Jesus and Kate get to know each other while Chris Brown makes a pass at Brianna. Nico deals with the stress of the boat on the 3-month anniversary of the passing of his brother. Matt makes a move on Brianna.

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans
programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Beach Blues
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar, We Have a Problem
programme.desc: For real-life astronauts Suni and Leland, space travel is a breeze compared to getting their dogs to play nice. Then, Cesar meets Mongo, a pit-mix doubling as an escape artist.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Grizzly Dogs
programme.desc: Nat Geo WILD host Casey Anderson and wife, actress Missi Pyle cant get a handle on her two dogs. So they enlist the help of Cesar Millan.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shadow Dogs
programme.desc: Responsible for handling search and rescue dogs, Marcy and Nick know that canine obedience can mean the difference between life and death. But German shepherd pups Neco and Yona have a shadowy track record.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Howie Mandel's Big Deal
programme.desc: Comic and television personality Howie Mandel and his wife Terry deal with their Chihuahua Lola's aggressive behaviour. If Howie could have it his way, he would never go near the dog at all.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Flip 'N Stitch

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Alpacalypse

programme.desc: Before the Pols can go work on their lake house, Dr. Pol must treat an array of clients.

programme.desc: Find out how mosquito coils, solar-assist tricycles, palm oil, and fiberglass chopper guns are made.

programme.desc: Glass faucets, firetruck ladders, antique clock restoration, and barbecue utensils are featured.

programme.desc: Learn how fish decoys, film digitization, cylinder stoves and concrete light poles are made.

programme.desc: Follow the production of balloons, wallpaper, frozen french fries and incandescent light bulbs.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi's Cursed Quest
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi's Cursed Quest
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Expedition Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: Scientists on the hunt for extraterrestrial life suspect that it might be closer than we think: our very own solar system. Using the latest discoveries, experts might at last confirm that our neighbors might harbor alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Wrath of the Black Hole
programme.desc: New discoveries are changing everything we know about black holes, and using the latest science and technology, experts reveal secrets to the mysterious behind these strange and deadly places.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Cassini's Grand Finale
programme.desc: Go inside the final moments of NASA's Cassini mission, a 20-year project to explore Saturn and its moons. Cassini revealed the secrets of strange new worlds that could harbor alien life, changing everything we know about our Solar System.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Dark Origins of the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that everything we know about our moon could be wrong, and now, investigators are racing to understand the mysteries of its dark and violent past.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Missing Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally reveal how supermassive black holes are made, and using the latest technology, experts are on the verge of understanding how these monsters grow and how they affect life on our planet.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: That's Him!
programme.desc: A successful car salesman is killed in a hail of gunfire that erupted on his front porch.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Death and the Maiden
programme.desc: 27-year-old mother Dana Satterfield is found brutally raped and strangled in her South Carolina hair salon. Detectives soon discover they're chasing a dangerous killer who may not be finished.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Murder-in-Law
programme.desc: When Dallas mother Nancy Lyon dies of a mysterious illness in 1991, her wealthy father tells police she was poisoned by her own husband. But the case is far from closed, and the investigation will uncover family secrets with shocking implications.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Bodies
programme.desc: After struggles in their youth, they are setting out on new paths with new hope but then the unthinkable happens. Their horrific murders are chilling. Find out who would kill them in such a violent way and if they had any idea they were in danger.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Everybody's Daughter
programme.desc: When Kate Johnson is murdered in her dorm room, detectives are stumped why this innocent young woman was targeted. After taking 400 DNA samples and establishing a secret task force, detectives track down Kate's killer and get their chilling answer.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: After beautiful and brilliant Tiffany Jenks is killed in Fairview Oregon, an investigation uncovers multiple suspects, including Tiffany's ex-boyfriend and three strangers who meet her at a bar and reveals a twisted and mysterious motive for murder.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'Tis the Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: The Bobby and Damaris Show: Taste of Home
programme.desc: Cozy up in Chef Bobby Flay's kitchen as he and Damaris Phillips talk about comfort food and make feel-good favourites with one of their favourite people: Ina Garten. Bobby makes a red chile glazes meatloaf and Ina makes parmesan mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.desc: The most storied and celebrated Hollywood icon of all time, John Wayne.

programme.title: Sniper: Inside the Crosshairs

programme.desc: Bob Baer, a former CIA agent, begins a worldwide investigation into the truth about assassin Lee Harvey Oswald and President John F. Kennedy's murder. Bob uncovers that Oswald and Soviet officials had met in Mexico six weeks prior to the assassination.

programme.title: JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald: The Russian Network
programme.desc: CIA veteran Bob Baer shifts his focus to Moscow and delves deeper into the possible connections between Oswald and the Russian government. A former KGB officer provides shocking testimony that shakes up the investigation.

programme.title: Nazis: Ultimate Evil

programme.title: Vietnam in HD: The Beginning (1964-1965)
programme.desc: In 1965, Operation Rolling Thunder roars across the skies over North Vietnam and the first U. S. ground troops land. American soldiers are outnumbered in the Ia Drang Valley, the first major battle of the war.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Tasty Boys
